content.en:
Tongyang Mountain Instrument Spirit was extremely surprised when he saw that Ye Tian had brought back a Space Boundary River Monument.

"This new master is really powerful, he has obtained another boundary river monument so quickly!"

The Machine Spirit Secret Path.

His former master, Tongyang Controller, had only obtained such a Boundary River Monument in his life, and he couldn't do it if he wanted to obtain a second relatively complete Boundary River Monument, while Ye Tian had obtained another Spatial Boundary River Monument in a short period of time, and it was a very complete Spatial Boundary River Monument.

What's more, the new master's strength has improved too quickly.

When he first met Ye Tian, he was only an eight-realm level controller, but now he was already a three-realm level controller.

At this speed, wouldn't it be long before he could surpass the strength of the former master Tongyang Controller, the Five Realms-level Controller?

"My new master is too wicked!"

Tongyang Mountain Instrument Spirit Road.

......

Ye Tian didn't know the mental activities of the machine spirit, he put this space boundary river tablet in the Tongyang Tower, and then began to comprehend this space boundary river tablet.

In the days that followed, he began to grasp the changes in the way of space.

As the years passed, Ye Tian mastered a variety of changes in the way of space.

Soon, the 10,000 Realms River Year passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had only mastered tens of thousands of changes, and he was still a long way from creating the Origin Control Technique.

this day.

Ye Tian came to Tuta again, he wanted to enter the misty exploration time and space again, after all, it was white and some key fragments, so he naturally wanted to find it.

In this way, Ye Tian kept going back and forth between Tuta and Tongyang Mountain, and from time to time he would synthesize some treasure boxes and open some resource rewards to improve his strength.

Gradually, the 200,000 Realm River years passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already mastered the millions of changes of the Dao of Space, and he could completely create an Origin Control Technique based on the Dao of Space.

Of course, he did not stop, but continued to create.

Although it took a long time to continue to master more spatial path changes, and the difficulty was getting bigger and bigger, Ye Tian wanted to create a slightly more powerful Origin Control Technique, so he would rather spend more time.

300,000 Realm River Years!

500,000 Realm River Years!

In the 600,000th Boundary River Year, Ye Tian was lucky, and he synthesized a key in Tuta and exchanged it for a Boundary River Tablet again.

This time, the Boundary River Monument he exchanged was the Defense Boundary River Monument, but it was not very complete, and there was a small gap, but he was also satisfied.

A million years later.

Tongyang Mountain.

"I finally mastered the changes of the Dao of Two Million Spaces, but I didn't expect that it was only double the changes, but it took five times more time, and it was so difficult to master ten million or even ten million changes!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, if you want to reach the Seven Realms level master or above, it is really too difficult.

After that, Ye Tian focused on the way of space, trying to create a second origin control technique.

This time, the Origin Control Technique he wanted to create was naturally more powerful, so it was more difficult, and it would naturally take longer.

In the blink of an eye, it took him nearly 200,000 Realm River Years to finally create the second Origin Control Technique.

Tongyang Mountain, a time and space for experimenting with moves.

Here Ye Tian played the Origin Control Technique he had just created-Air Shock!

Rumble!!!!

Space oscillated, and after a moment of stagnation, time and space shattered in an instant and turned into nothingness.

"It's a terrifying origin control technique, it's even more terrifying than the fire explosion, and the air shock can also block the enemy's escape, and from the air shock this origin control skill, it can also extend the use of various spaces. Ye Tian muttered.

After creating the Void Shock, his strength has increased a lot again, but he still hasn't reached the combat power of the Four Realms.

If you want to become a master of the Four Realms, it is still very difficult.

Next, Ye Tian mastered the change of specializing in the way of defense, and then tried to create a defense-type origin control technique.

In fact, many changes in the Dao of Space, the Dao of Defense, and the Dao of Fire can all be combined to form a defensive origin control technique.

However, Ye Tian needed time to slowly study and create, which was in no hurry.

After creating the air quake, Ye Tian's luck seemed to be good, and soon after, he found another key fragment in the foggy exploration space, and synthesized a key again.

This time, he exchanged a Thunder Realm River Tablet from Tuta.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to pick wool like this, but he never obtained the No. 1 key fragment again.

It is estimated that the No. 1 key fragments are scattered in one level after another, and it is impossible for the Mist Exploration Time and Space to have all the No. 1 fragments.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to rely on the misty exploration time and space to take away all the fragments of the No. 1 key, it was almost impossible.

Of course, he can get together a small key and some large and small treasure boxes, which is still possible.

In the next few million realm river years, Ye Tian created the third Origin Control Technique, the Heavenly Imperial Body!

Once the Heavenly Imperial Body is cast, Ye Tian's body surface will form an indestructible shield golden light, which can resist attacks of the same rank.

After millions of realms of river years, Ye Tian once again created the fourth Origin Control Technique, the Thunder Body Nine Flashes, which is an Origin Control Technique that enhances speed and dodges, which can make up for Ye Tian's weakness in speed and body technique.

The increase in the four Origin Control Techniques directly allowed Ye Tian to step into the Four Realms Level Masters realm, but he almost exhausted his aura, and there was no way to create a fifth Origin Control Technique in a short period of time.

Of course.

Ye Tian was also very excited to be promoted to the Four Realms level controller this time.

Next, if he wants to impact the Five Realms level master, he must make a breakthrough in the body of control, such as being promoted to the body of level eighth, and his strength will inevitably skyrocket.

However, if the seventh-level mastery body wants to be promoted to the eighth-level mastery body, the difficulty is like a move against the sky.

He also exchanged the small key from Tuta for a lot of treasures that helped improve his control body, but there was no way to break the shackles.

"Tuta's wool is almost done, and if you continue to pick it up, the harvest will not be big, and you must get greater opportunities from other places to hope for improvement. Ye Tian thought.

At this time, the few locations given by the fourth senior sister were useless, and what he lacked now was not a matter of one boundary river monument or two boundary river monuments.

Immediately, he collected information on the Origin Realm Sea and various forbidden areas, so as to understand the situation and see if he could gain something.

However, the harvest is not big, and where everyone wants it, where can there be a chance, where can he take his turn!

Moreover, even if there is really a big opportunity, people will not leak it, and most of the opportunities that can be leaked are taken away by people.

this day.

Yan Yan's controller is looking for Ye Tian!
